text: elderly people to enable them to be fit and active. 10 Guideline 1 Eat variety of foods to ensure a balanced diet Rationale: Nutritionally adequate diet should be consumed through a wise choice from a variety of foods /c118Nutrition is a basic prerequisite to sustain life. /c118Variety in food is not only the spice of life but also the essence of nutrition and health. /c118A diet consisting of foods from several food groups provides all the required nutrients in proper amounts. /c118Cereals, millets and pulses are major sources of most nutrients. /c118Milk which provides good quality proteins and calcium must be an essential item of the diet, particularly for infants, children and women. /c118Oils and nuts are calorie-rich foods, and are useful for increasing the energy density and quality
